certificates.proof: exact prefix check q^o(j) >= 2^j for j = 1..d, plus per-period surplus q^o > 2^d; every prefix of the periodic word is a prefix-of-period plus whole periods, and both factors are >= 1

statement: S_{3,-1} (the 3n-1 survivor set, whose word system and all statistics are IDENTICAL to Collatz's S_{3,+1}) provably contains the positive integers 1, 5, 17 - the cycle minima. The all-odd universal survivor is x = -eps: for 3n+1 it is -1 (not positive), for 3n-1 it is +1.
